title: 6 Packs Extra Large Vacuum Storage Bags [130 x 100 cm], XXL Vacuum Bags for Storage Airtight Space Saver Jumbo Vacuum Storage Bags for Duvets Clothes Travel
features: Maximize Your Storage Space: This 4-pack of jumbo vacuum storage bags (100x130cm) instantly creates extra space in wardrobes, closets, garages, and suitcases. Achieve up to 80% more space without the hassle of a major clean-out, making seasonal rotations and home organization effortless.

Ensure Perfect Protection: Our bags utilize a strong vacuum seal to safeguard your belongings. They effectively lock out air, moisture, dust, and odors, keeping your clothes, duvets, and pillows fresh and clean season after season. Your items remain in pristine condition, ready for use.

Strong Airtight Seal: Featuring a reliable double-zip closure and a dedicated turbo valve, these bags ensure a powerful, leak-proof vacuum. This robust design blocks mildew, bacteria, and insects, providing secure, long-term protection for your valuable clothing and bedding.

Versatile Storage Solution: Ideal for compactly storing a wide range of items,including bulky duvets, pillows, bed linens, blankets, and seasonal clothing. These versatile bags help you declutter any space while guaranteeing your possessions are shielded from damp and dust.

Ideal For Travel & Moving: Perfect for travelers and those on the move, these space-saving bags maximize luggage capacity, reducing the need for multiple bags. Easily vacuum seal your items using any standard vacuum cleaner hose (hand pump not included) for quick and efficient packing.
